name: iWallet Corp
business: iWallet Corporation designs and develops biometric locking wallets and related physical, personal security products. The company's products incorporate biometric security and wireless communication technologies to protect against personal identity and financial information theft. The company also provides consulting services in connection with protective wallets and other personal security products.

exposures.sentence: Updated capacitive touch fingerprint sensor with improved sensitivity, security and reliability compared to the original iWallet device
Improved RFID shielding materials for enhanced identity protection
Our primary target demographic is consumers who are in the market for high-end luxury storage cases and similar accessories.
GPS tracking capability and Find My Device app connectivity

catalysts.sentence: We intend to begin taking pre-sales orders for our products in Q3 of 2026, with direct sales and deliveries starting in Q4.
